title: Elder/Dependent Adult Abuse Reporting * Native American Community - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Diverse Populations > Elder/Dependent Adult Abuse Reporting * Native American Community 1 Matching Service Providers Refine Results - Select - No Filter Native American Community Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF CONFEDERATED TRIBES OF THE UMATILLA INDIAN RESERVATION FAMILY VIOLENCE SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Helps survivors of domestic/intimate partner violence, sexual assault, rape, stalking, teen dating violence, and elder abuse with safety planning and guidance through the justice systems (Tribal, state, and federal). 46411 Timine Way Pendleton, OR 97801 Eligibility: Survivors of domestic or intimate partner violence, sexual assault, rape, stalking, teen dating violence, and elder abuse Hours: Hotline: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Office: Monday-Friday 7:30am-4pm Email (541) 240-4171 Get Directions Visit Website More Details CONFEDERATED TRIBES OF THE UMATILLA INDIAN RESERVATION FAMILY VIOLENCE SERVICES
